steps.title: Translate 'twice the number of CDs that Cathy has'
steps.content:
Cathy has n CDs. The phrase twice the number means multiply by 2. So twice the number of CDs that Cathy has is:
$$2n$$

steps.title: Add '3 more' and identify the answer
steps.content:
Gerry has 3 more than that amount. The phrase 3 more than means add 3:
$$2n + 3$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
